Explore CPIPG’s properties around Europe
Warsaw Spire
Warsaw | Poland
#Offices
The myhive Warsaw Spire tower with its 180 meters and 49 floors, currently is the highest office tower in Poland and at the same time the most prestigious location for an office in the whole country.
View more
Quadrio
Prague | Czech Republic
#Offices
#Retail
#Residential
Quadrio is a mixed-use property which combines high-end offices, a convenience-style shopping mall and apartments in the heart of Prague 1. The building is home to the CPI Property Group's office headquarters in Prague.
View more
Aqua Höfe
Berlin | Germany
#Offices
Aqua-Höfe is an office complex located on Lobeckstraße, Berlin, Kreuzberg. The property provides over 19,000 m² of GLA for office tenants and was extended in 2019.

About us
CPI Property Group is a family-owned company founded in the Czech Republic more than 30 years ago. We are experts in owning and managing income-generating real estate.
CPIPG owns a property portfolio valued at €18 billion, focused on the Czech Republic, Berlin, Poland and the CEE region. Nearly half of the portfolio consists of offices in key central European capital cities of Berlin, Prague, and Warsaw where we hold leading positions.
With 510 commercial properties, around 6,200 international and local tenants, and exposure to multiple geographies and property segments, CPIPG’s portfolio is large and well-diversified.
We are proud of our active asset management and local teams: in every country where we operate, our teams have daily contact and close relationships with tenants.
Our property portfolio is supported by a conservative capital structure, with superb access to the international bond and bank markets.
Sustainability is central to everything we do, and the Group has made bold ESG commitments including environmental targets which are aligned to the Paris agreement.
Our founder and primary shareholder, Radovan Vítek, fully supports CPIPG's plans and strategic objectives for the future.
CPI Property Group is registered in Luxembourg and listed on the Frankfurt stock exchange.
